mapper.sql: e.id, e.creator_user_id, (SELECT creator.full_name FROM app_users creator WHERE creator.id = e.creator_user_id) AS creator_name, (SELECT creator.avatar_url FROM app_users creator WHERE creator.id = e.creator_user_id) AS creator_avatar_url, e.title_hr, e.title_en, e.where_hr, e.where_en, e.address, e.about_hr, e.about_en, e.when_iso, e.start_at, e.end_at, e.event_type, e.latitude, e.longitude, e.entrance_latitude, e.entrance_longitude, e.entry_instructions_hr, e.entry_instructions_en, e.visibility, e.attendance_mode, e.price_amount, e.price_currency, e.capacity, e.status, e.source_url, e.event_rating_average, e.event_rating_count, e.organizer_rating_average, e.organizer_rating_count, e.participant_count, COALESCE(( SELECT STRING_AGG(et.tag, ',' ORDER BY LOWER(et.tag)) FROM event_tags et WHERE et.event_id = e.id ), '') AS tags_csv, ( SELECT COUNT(*)::INTEGER FROM event_participants ep_wait WHERE ep_wait.event_id = e.id AND ep_wait.status = 'waitlisted' ) AS waitlist_count

(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_likes el_count WHERE el_count.event_id = e.id) AS like_count, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event_likes el_me WHERE el_me.event_id = e.id AND el_me.user_id = #{userId} ) AS liked_by_me
(6371 * acos(least(1, greatest(-1, cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(e.latitude)) * cos(radians(e.longitude) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(e.latitude)) ))))

( (e.visibility = 'public' AND e.status = 'published') OR ( e.visibility = 'friends' AND e.status = 'published' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM friend_requests fr_access WHERE fr_access.status = 'accepted' AND ( (fr_access.requester_user_id = #{userId} AND fr_access.recipient_user_id = e.creator_user_id) OR (fr_access.recipient_user_id = #{userId} AND fr_access.requester_user_id = e.creator_user_id) ) ) ) OR e.creator_user_id = #{userId} )

NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_feed_blocks ufb_event WHERE ufb_event.user_id = #{userId} AND ufb_event.block_type = 'event' AND ufb_event.target_id = e.id ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_feed_blocks ufb_creator WHERE ufb_creator.user_id = #{userId} AND ufb_creator.block_type = 'creator' AND ufb_creator.target_id = e.creator_user_id ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_feed_blocks ufb_tag INNER JOIN event_tags et_blocked ON et_blocked.event_id = e.id AND LOWER(et_blocked.tag) = ufb_tag.target_id WHERE ufb_tag.user_id = #{userId} AND ufb_tag.block_type = 'tag' )
mapper.select: SELECT , , ep.status AS user_participant_status FROM events e LEFT JOIN event_participants ep ON ep.event_id = e.id AND ep.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN event_feed_impressions efi ON efi.event_id = e.id AND efi.user_id = #{userId} WHERE AND e.status = 'published' AND COALESCE(e.start_at, e.when_iso) >= NOW() AND AND ORDER BY COALESCE(CASE WHEN efi.interacted_at IS NULL THEN efi.shown_count ELSE 0 END, 0) ASC, MD5(#{seed} || ':' || e.id) ASC, COALESCE(e.start_at, e.when_iso) ASC, e.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, user_id, block_type, target_id, target_label, created_at FROM user_feed_blocks WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY CASE block_type WHEN 'event' THEN 0 WHEN 'creator' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, target_label ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT , , ep.status AS user_participant_status FROM events e LEFT JOIN event_participants ep ON ep.event_id = e.id AND ep.user_id = #{userId} WHERE e.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT , , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event_blocks eb_me WHERE eb_me.event_id = e.id AND eb_me.user_id = #{userId} ) THEN 'blocked' ELSE ep.status END AS user_participant_status FROM events e LEFT JOIN event_participants ep ON ep.event_id = e.id AND ep.user_id = #{userId} WHERE e.id = #{id} AND LIMIT 1

SELECT , , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event_blocks eb_me WHERE eb_me.event_id = e.id AND eb_me.user_id = #{userId} ) THEN 'blocked' ELSE ep.status END AS user_participant_status FROM event_likes el INNER JOIN events e ON e.id = el.event_id LEFT JOIN event_participants ep ON ep.event_id = e.id AND ep.user_id = #{userId} WHERE el.user_id = #{userId} AND AND ORDER BY el.created_at DESC, e.start_at DESC, e.id DESC

SELECT , , ep.status AS user_participant_status FROM events e LEFT JOIN event_participants ep ON ep.event_id = e.id AND ep.user_id = #{userId} WHERE e.creator_user_id = #{targetUserId} AND e.start_at >= NOW() AND AND ORDER BY e.start_at ASC, e.id ASC

SELECT id, event_id, media_type, url, thumbnail_url, original_filename, storage_key, bucket_name, content_type, byte_size, width, height, sort_order FROM event_media WHERE event_id = #{eventId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT id, event_id, media_type, url, thumbnail_url, original_filename, storage_key, bucket_name, content_type, byte_size, width, height, sort_order FROM event_media WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND id = #{mediaId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(byte_size), 0) FROM event_media WHERE storage_key IS NOT NULL

SELECT ep.event_id, ep.user_id, u.full_name, u.avatar_url, ep.status, ep.joined_at, ep.approved_at, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event_blocks eb WHERE eb.event_id = ep.event_id AND eb.user_id = ep.user_id ) AS blocked FROM event_participants ep INNER JOIN app_users u ON u.id = ep.user_id WHERE ep.event_id = #{eventId} AND ep.status IN ('joined', 'approved', 'waitlisted', 'rejected') ORDER BY CASE ep.status WHEN 'waitlisted' THEN 0 WHEN 'approved' THEN 1 WHEN 'joined' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, ep.joined_at ASC, u.full_name ASC
SELECT COUNT(*)::INTEGER FROM event_participants WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND status = 'waitlisted'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e WHERE e.visibility = 'public'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO events ( id, creator_user_id, title_hr, title_en, where_hr, where_en, address, about_hr, about_en, when_iso, start_at, end_at, event_type, latitude, longitude, entrance_latitude, entrance_longitude, entry_instructions_hr, entry_instructions_en, visibility, attendance_mode, price_amount, price_currency, capacity, status, source_url, event_rating_average, event_rating_count, organizer_rating_average, organizer_rating_count, participant_count ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{creatorUserId}, #{titleHr}, #{titleEn}, #{whereHr}, #{whereEn}, #{address}, #{aboutHr}, #{aboutEn}, #{whenIso}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{eventType}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{entranceLatitude}, #{entranceLongitude}, #{entryInstructionsHr}, #{entryInstructionsEn}, #{visibility}, #{attendanceMode}, #{priceAmount}, #{priceCurrency}, #{capacity}, #{status}, #{sourceUrl}, COALESCE(#{eventRatingAverage,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0), #{eventRatingCount}, COALESCE(#{organizerRatingAverage,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0), #{organizerRatingCount}, #{participantCount} )

INSERT INTO event_media ( id, event_id, media_type, url, thumbnail_url, original_filename, storage_key, bucket_name, content_type, byte_size, width, height, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{eventId}, #{mediaType}, #{url}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{originalFilename}, #{storageKey}, #{bucketName}, #{contentType}, #{byteSize}, #{width}, #{height}, #{sortOrder} )

INSERT INTO user_feed_blocks ( id, user_id, block_type, target_id, target_label ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{blockType}, #{targetId}, #{targetLabel} ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, block_type, target_id) DO UPDATE SET target_label = EXCLUDED.target_label, created_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO event_feed_impressions ( user_id, event_id, shown_count, last_shown_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{eventId}, 1, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, event_id) DO UPDATE SET shown_count = event_feed_impressions.shown_count + 1, last_shown_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()
INSERT INTO event_feed_impressions ( user_id, event_id, interacted_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{eventId}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, event_id) DO UPDATE SET interacted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE events SET title_hr = #{titleHr}, title_en = #{titleEn}, where_hr = #{whereHr}, where_en = #{whereEn}, address = #{address}, about_hr = #{aboutHr}, about_en = #{aboutEn}, when_iso = #{whenIso}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, entrance_latitude = #{entranceLatitude}, entrance_longitude = #{entranceLongitude}, entry_instructions_hr = #{entryInstructionsHr}, entry_instructions_en = #{entryInstructionsEn}, visibility = #{visibility}, attendance_mode = #{attendanceMode}, price_amount = #{priceAmount}, price_currency = #{priceCurrency}, capacity = #{capacity}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event_participants ( event_id, user_id, status, joined_at, approved_at ) VALUES ( #{eventId}, #{userId}, #{status}, NOW(), CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('joined', 'approved') THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END ) ON CONFLICT (event_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, joined_at = CASE WHEN event_participants.status = 'left' THEN NOW() ELSE event_participants.joined_at END, approved_at = CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.status IN ('joined', 'approved') THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END
mapper.update: UPDATE events SET participant_count = participant_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{eventId}
UPDATE events SET participant_count = GREATEST(participant_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{eventId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event_organizer_ratings ( event_id, organizer_user_id, rater_user_id, rating, comment ) VALUES ( #{eventId}, #{organizerUserId}, #{raterUserId}, #{rating}, #{comment} ) ON CONFLICT (event_id, rater_user_id) DO UPDATE SET rating = EXCLUDED.rating, comment = EXCLUDED.comment, organizer_user_id = EXCLUDED.organizer_user_id, created_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO event_ratings ( event_id, rater_user_id, rating, comment ) VALUES ( #{eventId}, #{raterUserId}, #{rating}, #{comment} ) ON CONFLICT (event_id, rater_user_id) DO UPDATE SET rating = EXCLUDED.rating, comment = EXCLUDED.comment, created_at = NOW()
INSERT INTO app_notifications ( id, user_id, notification_type, title, body, event_id ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{notificationType}, #{title}, #{body}, #{eventId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE events SET status = 'finished', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'published' AND COALESCE(end_at, start_at, when_iso) < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'
